label: Transparent diatom motif source
prompt:
Use case: scientific-educational
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source on chroma-key background
Primary request: Create only one complete diatom shell microorganism, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A precise microscopy-view diatom frustule shell with radial and oval geometry, translucent glass-gold silica ribs, perforated lattice pores, delicate blue shadow glazing, and plankton-bloom biological accuracy. The subject should feel like a refined scientific specimen and a design-system source, not a cartoon.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any shell edge, pore field, spine, or rib. Use a single specimen only.
Lighting/mood: clean microscope illumination, crisp silica edges, glassy gold highlights, blue internal shadow, high material detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no green screen, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection outside the shell.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: horizontal Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a STRICT HORIZONTAL 16:9 WIDESCREEN design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Diatom". The canvas must be landscape, not portrait, with a wide dashboard-style layout spanning left to right.
Reference use: Derive every color and texture from the visible transparent diatom shell motif: glass-gold silica ribs, oval radial pore lattice, blue microscopy shadow, plankton bloom biology, pale microscope slide whites, and deep microscope ink.
Canvas: exact landscape 16:9 widescreen, 3840 x 2160 px. Never rotate the board. Do not create a tall poster. Fill the wide frame with a top header and multiple horizontal columns.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Diatom, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Layout: left vertical navigation rail, top token header, central component matrix, right dashboard/data column, bottom strip for radius spacing shadows texture tokens. Use broad horizontal bands and large section labels so the board reads when downscaled.
Typography: English UI samples and Japanese samples: ダイアトム, 観測データ, 微細構造. Include Geist and Noto Sans JP style guidance.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command search, navigation, dashboard charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn product system, precise microscopy interface, 8px radii only, silica glass panels, gold hairline borders, blue focus rings, crisp scientific data grid.
Palette labels: Silica White, Slide Surface, Golden Frustule, Pore Amber, Blue Shadow, Bloom Teal Gray, Microscope Ink, Plankton Glass, Sediment Line.
Constraints: no portrait composition, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Diatom", no illegible microtext, no radii larger than 8px.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: horizontal Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a STRICT HORIZONTAL 16:9 WIDESCREEN dark-mode companion board for "Morphous Diatom". It must feel like the same system as the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent diatom motif and visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the same sections, component coverage, palette roles, 8px radius, precise microscopy tone, silica-gold lattice texture, blue shadow accents, Japanese typography, navigation, data/dashboard, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, spacing, radius, and shadows.
Canvas: exact landscape 16:9 widescreen, 3840 x 2160 px. Never create a portrait or tall poster. Fill the wide frame with a top header and multiple horizontal UI columns.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Diatom, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Dark palette direction: deep microscope ink background, dark blue shadow panels, translucent silica outlines, glass-gold primary accents, pore amber warning states, bloom teal-gray secondary states, pale plankton glass text and dividers. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn dark buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches.
Typography: English UI samples and Japanese samples: ダイアトム, 観測データ, 微細構造. Include Geist and Noto Sans JP style guidance.
Style: premium dark product design-system board, precise microscopy console, 8px radii only, crisp scientific data grid, subtle silica texture overlays, high contrast but not neon.
Constraints: no portrait composition, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure black only, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Diatom", no illegible microtext, no radii larger than 8px.
